subject: Gaming
title: Valorant Champions: Riot's Second Empire
description: A quick win: understand Valorant Champions: Riot's Second Empire.

hook.text: Riot launched Valorant in 2020 and built a tier-one esports scene from scratch within two years.

buildup.text: Combining Counter-Strike gunplay with hero abilities, Valorant attracted both audiences instantly.

discovery.text: Riot learned from LoL and created a partnership model—balancing franchise stability with open qualifiers.

twist.text: Valorant poached top CS players and organizations. Counter-Strike's dominance was suddenly under threat.

climax.text: Valorant Champions fills arenas worldwide. Riot proved they could build esports empires twice.

punchline.text: Riot built one empire with LoL. Then they built another with Valorant.

quiz.question: How did Valorant quickly build its esports scene?
options: Riot used lessons from LoL and poached top CS players and organizations
It copied the Overwatch League model
